description: Address review issues: disconnect no-watermark toggle fix, XSS prevention in picker rendering, origin restriction in worker, Shopee graceful handling, and Cobalt API auth support.
steps: Fix no-watermark toggle: wire the checkbox state into buildRequestBody so it affects tiktokFullAudio parameter
Fix XSS in picker thumbnails: replace innerHTML string concatenation with DOM API methods (createElement, setAttribute)
Add origin restriction to worker.js: check Origin/Referer header against an allowlist, return 403 for unknown origins
Add graceful Shopee handling: detect Shopee URLs and show a note that support is experimental
Add Cobalt API auth: read env.COBALT_API_KEY and attach Authorization header if present
acceptance_criteria: noWatermark checkbox state is read in buildRequestBody and affects request parameters
Picker results are rendered using DOM APIs (createElement/setAttribute) not innerHTML with string concatenation
Worker checks origin/referer and rejects requests from unknown origins
Shopee URLs display a note about experimental support before attempting download
Worker uses env.COBALT_API_KEY for Authorization header when available
verification: Verify showPickerResults uses createElement instead of innerHTML string building
Verify worker.js has origin checking logic
Verify Shopee platform detection includes experimental note handling
